steps.title: Use Desmos to fit the table
steps.content: Because the relationship is linear, put two table rows into Desmos as lists: $x_1=[0,1]$ and $y_1=[20,21]$. Then type $y_1 \sim m x_1+b$. Desmos returns $m=1$ and $b=20$, so the equation is $y=x+20$.

steps.title: Find the y-intercept and identify the answer
steps.content: The Desmos model $y=x+20$ has slope 1 and y-intercept 20. This eliminates A, B, and C because their slopes are 20 or 22. Choice D is exactly $y=x+20$, so D is correct.
